description_long: This is a single gas station pump unit with a prominent red and gray color scheme, featuring a large, rounded canopy labeled 'Quality PROclean Gasolines' supported by two vertical columns. The front of the pump is detailed with various stickers, a digital display, a keypad, and two fuel dispensers with hoses and nozzles on either side. The pump is marked as 'CLOSED' with a sign above the main interface, and additional signage and stickers are scattered across the body, adding a weathered, urban feel. The canopy is thick and circular, providing shelter over the fueling area, and is visually anchored by the two columns. The sides and rear of the pump are less detailed but still display hoses, nozzles, and some stickers. The overall design is modern, with a utilitarian structure and clear branding.
description: A modern, red and gray gas station pump with a large circular canopy, dual fuel dispensers, digital interface, and extensive signage and stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main interface, digital display, 'CLOSED' sign, two fuel dispensers, and heavy sticker coverage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the canopy, the vertical columns, and hoses running along the side with some stickers.
description_view_2: Rear view with a simpler interface, two fuel dispensers, hoses, and fewer stickers, lacking the prominent 'CLOSED' sign.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the canopy's structure, hoses, and a variety of stickers along the column.
attribute_fuel_pumps: Two modern fuel pumps are integrated into the main body, one on each side, each with a hose and nozzle. The pumps are red and gray, with digital displays and keypads, and are adorned with various stickers. Both pumps are positioned symmetrically and appear to be standard for urban gas stations.
attribute_canopy_structure: A large, circular, red canopy with gray accents covers the fueling area, supported by two sturdy vertical columns. The canopy is thick and provides substantial shelter, with the brand name 'Quality PROclean Gasolines' prominently displayed. No visible lighting is attached, but the structure is robust and modern.
attribute_station_signage: The main signage is the 'Quality PROclean Gasolines' text on the canopy, which is large, white, and wraps around the front and sides. Additional signage includes a 'CLOSED' sign above the pump interface, various small stickers and decals on the pump body, and some safety or promotional notices.
